subcodes.first_line: The Book from before the Wronged One to him who hath turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon and desireth to drink from the Kawthar of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی من اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و اراد ان یشرب کوثر البیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
